domain: Mosuo zou hun walking marriage (matrilineal Yunnan/Sichuan; no-contract visit-relationship; each partner retains primary residence in matrilineal Awo house; multiple parallel walking marriages permitted; night-visits only)
specific_mechanism: Inference-time dual-equal persona-attractor scheme: model holds two distinct persona-vectors (Awo A, Awo B) as steering directions in residual stream; per-query a scalar router α ∈ [0,1] computes a soft mix activation a(t) = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B added to residual stream; α is computed from query embedding + brief context; no parameters are committed to either attractor permanently between queries.
llm_application: ZOU-HUN-BASIN: a no-commitment dual-equal-persona-attractor inference scheme. Model maintains two persona-attractor vectors v_A, v_B as fixed steering directions in the residual stream (computed offline via mean activation difference, like ITI or RepE). At inference, per-query router α = sigmoid(W_router · h_query) yields a soft convex mix v_mix(α) = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B added to residual stream of selected layers L. Neither attractor is committed; α can re-sample per query; multiple parallel personas remain simultaneously accessible (multiple v_i if desired). Differs from MoE expert-routing (commits expert per token), MasRouter (model-level routing, not steering-vector level), vLLM Semantic Router (model selection, not persona mix), TinyTroupe (programmatic persona definition without parameter-free no-commit routing), Attractor-Based Persona (single attractor collapse). Differs from R404 SAN-N!UM (basin trance termination by external judge) by maintaining BOTH attractors simultaneously, no termination event.
novelty_claim: Persona-vector steering (ITI, RepE) + LLM routing + mixture-of-personas all covered. ZOU-HUN-BASIN adds dual-equal-attractor + per-query soft router + no-parameter-commit. Recombination of persona-steering + scalar routing.
